title: Load Typed Environment Settings with Go
summary: Load APP_ENV, PORT, and DEBUG from environment variables with string, integer, and boolean parsing in Go.
highlights: Reads OS env or a test map
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Go 1.24.4 on macOS. Verified behavior covers required values, optional defaults, invalid integer input, invalid boolean input, and reading from the OS environment when the input map is nil.
